cochrane_query: ((([mh "Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2"] OR ("adults with type 2 diabetes":ti,ab,kw)) AND (([mh "Metformin"] OR ("metformin monotherapy":ti,ab,kw)) OR ([mh "Placebos"] OR ("placebo":ti,ab,kw))) AND ([mh "Cardiovascular Diseases"] OR ("cardiovascular events":ti,ab,kw))) AND ([pt "randomized controlled trial"] OR [pt "controlled clinical trial"] OR "randomized"[tiab] OR "randomised"[tiab])) AND [mh "Humans"]
europepmc_query: (((MESH:"Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2" OR (TITLE:"adults with type 2 diabetes" OR ABSTRACT:"adults with type 2 diabetes")) AND ((MESH:"Metformin" OR (TITLE:"metformin monotherapy" OR ABSTRACT:"metformin monotherapy")) OR (MESH:"Placebos" OR (TITLE:"placebo" OR ABSTRACT:"placebo"))) AND (MESH:"Cardiovascular Diseases" OR (TITLE:"cardiovascular events" OR ABSTRACT:"cardiovascular events"))) AND (PUB_TYPE:"randomized controlled trial" OR PUB_TYPE:"controlled clinical trial" OR "randomized"[tiab] OR "randomised"[tiab])) AND MESH:"Humans"

query: ((("Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2"[MeSH] OR "adults with type 2 diabetes"[Title/Abstract]) AND (("Metformin"[MeSH] OR "metformin monotherapy"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("Placebos"[MeSH] OR "placebo"[Title/Abstract])) AND ("Cardiovascular Diseases"[MeSH] OR "cardiovascular events"[Title/Abstract])) AND ("randomized controlled trial"[pt] OR "controlled clinical trial"[pt] OR "randomized"[tiab] OR "randomised"[tiab])) AND humans[MeSH]
